title: Drenyra — Fiscal Command Center
summary: The flagship of ARKELYTHEX. An agentic fiscal operating system where AI prepares, reviews, and explains accounting work under human supervision — versioned evidence, approval gates, SUNAT compliance built in.

title: Digital Public Peru
summary: Civic tech platform for fiscal transparency and public accountability. Audit-first design with Rust-powered core API and multi-surface frontends.
coverImageAlt: Digital Public Peru — civic transparency interface

title: elect-validate
summary: High-concurrency electoral act validation suite for Peru's ONPE. Go-powered concurrent processing with CLI and web interfaces.

title: EdgeTraz Agro
summary: AI-first agro-industrial traceability with edge-resilient operations. Offline-first sync protocol ensuring data integrity in disconnected rural environments.

title: Dreamcoder Dots
summary: Arch Linux dotfiles — a health-first terminal workbench. Cocoa/Lúcuma warmth, adaptive theming, 22 targets from one tokens.json.

title: CleanSweep
summary: AI-assisted dotfile manager in Rust. Declarative environment setup with stow-native implementation and TUI interface.

title: PSeInt Web Lab
summary: Modern pseudocode learning platform for CS education. Browser-based execution with auto-generated Mermaid diagrams.
